title: felicia bellidioides subsp. foliata
intro: Felicia bellidioides subsp. foliata, also known as the Cape daisy or Bush daisy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in South African folk medicine, for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone content. The medicinal properties of Felicia bellidioides subsp. foliata are believed to offer health benefits such as wound healing, pain relief, and protection against infections, making it a valuable plant for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Felicia bellidioides subsp. foliata include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
